codeReview.summary: The implementation in commit e4e9d73 satisfies the feature description and expected behavior: preferences are saved only after successful comparisons, restored on load with URL-over-localStorage precedence, corrupt JSON reads are safely handled, and per-chain token preferences are restored on chain switch.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill's restart command includes a background command pattern that can be blocked by the execution safety layer, causing avoidable retries.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md (Step 5) recommends `lsof -ti :3002 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; PORT=3002 npm run dev &`. Transcript skeleton for session a9902a37-65a2-4564-a77e-16ef64d144e0 shows this exact command failed with: `not safe to run as background process (contains: writing to devices)` before fallback to `PORT=3002 npm run dev &`.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill instructions, and commit diff for persist-user-choices. Feature behavior is correctly implemented and meets VAL-PREF-001/002/003/004 and VAL-CROSS-002 expectations. No code defects found in scope; one skill-procedure friction was noted in shared state observations.
